title: Fix allow/3 called on the wrong PID (supervisor, not child)
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/dynamic_supervisor_test.ex` calls `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.allow(MyApp.Repo, self(), supervisor_pid)` where `supervisor_pid` is the DynamicSupervisor's pid — but the supervisor itself never performs DB operations. The child workers spawned via `DynamicSupervisor.start_child/2` do. Rewrite to `test/my_app/job_runner_test.exs`: capture the child pid from `start_child/2` and call `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.allow(MyApp.Repo, self(), child_pid)`. The test must pass `caller: self()` into the child so it can message back `{:job_complete, result}`.
tier_rationale: Subtle bug — allow/3 is being called correctly in structure but on the wrong pid. Requires understanding process hierarchy.
